{{Infobox location
| name = Tal’gullour
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Tal’gullour Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tal’gullour is a massive, planet-sized fortress and spacecraft that floats in space. Originally forged by [[Daruman]], also known as [[the Mad King]], from his original [[Iteration]], the vessel serves as his citadel and headquarters. [[The Mad King]] maintains absolute authority over every part of the structure, which is saturated with his power. The fortress houses a population of approximately one billion people who maintain the vessel's shielding and manage its vast collections of rare, unique, and powerful objects. It also serves as the base for the [[Silent Servants]], a cult dedicated to the tiger [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Silent King]]. Tal’gullour is equipped with formidable defenses, including ancient golden rune-circles capable of locking down space and launching powerful barrages. The stronghold is noted for its immense splendor, rivaling the size of a planet and outshining other major fortresses.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Tal’gullour]] is a stronghold in [[Vroshir]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Tal’gullour]] is a planet-sized fortress floating in space.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] forged his original [[Iteration]] into the fortress [[Tal’gullour]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Tal’gullour]] is the Fortress of [[the Mad King]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Tal’gullour]] is the fortress and homeworld of [[Daruman]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Tal’gullour]] is larger than most habitable planets.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tal’gullour]] can release a thousand lines of light that act as a barrage.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tal’gullour]] fires bolts of gold that warp space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
